transcript.clean_text: a day after the music had stopped the wind pausing the party fahinis was back on track the Sun was shining in nice and on the tomna desonglay where the race will finish 24 hours after the start of stage seven things were all ready to get going nice and up the VAR Valley for the traditional start to the penultimate stage heading up to the first climb the longest of the race to reduce chateau then back into the valley an intermediate Sprint and the approach to the cordless climbed for the first time since 2017 in this race when Richie Port had been the winner three and a half thousand meters of climbing on paper the hardest stage of the week nine team Riders Got Away in a breakaway but they were never allowed more than three minutes their numbers began to whittle down inside the final 50 kilometers as well UA Emirates and then inios Grenadier is going to work a relative rest day in the legs the climbers were hungry for success all of that enthusiasm caused a crash or two getting vocodan going down and taking his teammate Spike he'd work hard to chase to get on but would lose a little too much and would not be in the final shake-up that final shake-up was to begin with around 15 kilometers to go before then though the break was being caught bit by bit and there was another crash before that final climb this time with more serious consequences in the GC Matteo scanmoreza having to leave the race this was our destination Springs showing off beautiful Southeast France and as the final 15 kilometer long climb began kobachosan's attack from what was left of the Breakaway taking Javier Romo with him the Belgian and the Spaniards stayed out there for a little while but then Tobias Foss went to work the only teammate left at this point for yombo visma and the early casualty was Danny Martinez pogacha remained guldu was there and vinegar's teammate continued to Tap Away the Rhythm he'd last until six kilometers from the Finish finally pulling in cousins the last survivor with nine case to go joined Martinez in being a GC Rider dropped and then after vignago attacked pogachar would soon go too caught up in the excitement behind soon back on his bike but missing his moment and bogacho was away they were in small groups along the climb or gacha was eventually brought back and vinegar doing the work to bring him Bal Dan Jorgensen would lose contact along the way of that happening and there were three with just less than four K's to go not a situation that would last too long though behind they were fighting for every saint couldn't possible we'll do launched his attack with two and a half kilometers to go able to follow vinegar again struggling but this time faring better than he had done three days previous no huge loss of time this time and he'd be back with a few hundred meters remaining and they'd look around at everybody allowed a few Riders to gain back precious seconds then the angego launched his own bid for Glory bogacho showing his power again the punch was there and nobody was able to live with him 12 days racing on the road having won half of them by this point and again Victorious the perfect behind East debut and pogacha now Prime for Success on the promenades only the time difference is not as big as they were a few days ago despite the decline being twice as long did it again second victory of the week adding to those picked up in the early season in Spain with Yates forth Paula Smith then made a Valdez sivakov Jorgensen and LaTour the top 10 separated by just 53 seconds yet again in the yellow Jersey one more day to defend for him though and the GC gaps in this race not enough to say it's a done deal just 12 seconds between pogacho and guldu 58 back to vingego the podium looking more or less safe but you never know with the final very very entertaining stage around these still to come short sharp not often sweet for everybody less than 120 K's climb after climb after climb and the famous Coles being the final climb of the race all to play foreign stage as usual on gcn plus the home of cycling
